title: OpenAI launches platform to manage AI agents - Axios
full_text: launches platform to manage AI agents OpenAI on Thursday released a new enterprise platform, Frontier, designed to let large companies build, deploy and manage fleets of AI agents that plug into their existing systems. Why it matters: OpenAI is stepping up its push into enterprise services as rivals
